scenes.description: Performance of the song "キラメキライダー☆" (Kirameki Rider).
MC section where members interact with the audience and introduce the next song.
Performance of the song "電脳ぴゅあおし大宣言" (Dennou Pure Oshi Daisengen).
scenes.song_name: 電脳ぴゅあおし大宣言

subtitles.original: ジャンプ！
subtitles.english: Jump!

subtitles.original: 君の心が幸せに染まるように
subtitles.english: So that your heart will be colored with happiness

subtitles.original: 重ねていくハーモニー
subtitles.english: Layers of harmony we build

subtitles.original: 煌めき纏って
subtitles.english: Draped in sparkling brilliance

subtitles.original: 歌い続けたいな
subtitles.english: I want to keep on singing

subtitles.original: 踊り続けたいな
subtitles.english: I want to keep on dancing

subtitles.original: そんな願いはわがままでもいいでしょう
subtitles.english: A wish like that can be selfish, can't it?

subtitles.original: だって楽しすぎて止まらない
subtitles.english: Because it's just too much fun to stop

subtitles.original: 輝くステージでもっともっと
subtitles.english: On this shining stage, even more, even more

subtitles.original: おいでよ！
subtitles.english: Come join us!

subtitles.original: ずっと！
subtitles.english: Always!

subtitles.original: 嬉しい楽しい愛しいだけじゃ語れない
subtitles.english: Being happy, having fun, or loving isn't enough to describe it

subtitles.original: 今も今も悩みはあるけど
subtitles.english: Even now, even now, I still have worries, but...

subtitles.original: ここにいるよ私
subtitles.english: I'm right here

subtitles.original: ここにいるよ
subtitles.english: I'm right here

subtitles.original: 君と同じ世界を
subtitles.english: Gazing at the same world

subtitles.original: 見つめて
subtitles.english: As you

subtitles.original: 行くよ！ キラメキライダー！
subtitles.english: Let's go! Kirameki Rider!

subtitles.original: 生まれたてのドキドキを響かせよう
subtitles.english: Let's make this fresh excitement resonate

subtitles.original: 最高の時間 最高の仲間と
subtitles.english: The best of times, with the best of friends

subtitles.original: ここにいるよ見つけてくれたから
subtitles.english: I'm here because you found me

subtitles.original: 君に会いたくてやってきたんだ
subtitles.english: I came here because I wanted to see you

subtitles.original: みんなで歌おう
subtitles.english: Let's all sing together

subtitles.original: 終わらないメロディ
subtitles.english: To this never-ending melody

subtitles.original: 煌めきにのって
subtitles.english: Riding on the sparkle

subtitles.original: 煌めき纏って
subtitles.english: Draped in sparkling brilliance

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: 2025年もあと少し！ みんな盛り上がってる？
subtitles.english: 2025 is almost over! Is everyone hyped up?

subtitles.original: 今回はカウントダウンライブ！
subtitles.english: This time it's a countdown live!

subtitles.original: あれ？ あれれ？ コメントの熱量、なんだか少なくない？
subtitles.english: Huh? Hmm? Isn't the comment enthusiasm a bit low?

subtitles.original: まだまだ足りない！ こんなんじゃ！
subtitles.english: It's still not enough! Not like this!

subtitles.original: いっくよー！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: この！この！この！この！
subtitles.english: This! This! This! This!

subtitles.original: この！この！この！この！
subtitles.english: This! This! This! This!

subtitles.original: 浮気は許しません！
subtitles.english: I won't allow any cheating!

subtitles.original: 私だけに尽くしてね！
subtitles.english: Devote yourself only to me!

subtitles.original: 私だけにヒット（集中）し、尽くさなきゃ嫌だあ、絶対ぞ！
subtitles.english: Focus only on me, you have to serve me, or I'll hate it, definitely!

subtitles.original: ズンチャ！
subtitles.english: Zuncha!

subtitles.original: カモンカモン　チョチョチョ　誰も
subtitles.english: Come on, come on, cho cho cho, don't let anyone...

subtitles.original: よそ見をしたら　ポンポンポンメッ！
subtitles.english: ...look away, or I'll punish you! Bad!

subtitles.original: メロメロめらっぽ　プププくらん
subtitles.english: Melo-melo melappo, pu-pu-pu klan

subtitles.original: ぴゅあおししましょう　アップププ
subtitles.english: Let's do a pure oshi, ap-pu-pu-pu

subtitles.original: ずっと歌を　見逃さないでしょう？
subtitles.english: You won't miss a single song, will you?

subtitles.original: 目移りはダメ　本当イヤイヤ
subtitles.english: No looking at others, I really hate that

subtitles.original: いつも見て見て　ウォッチも合ってる？
subtitles.english: Look at me always, are our eyes meeting?

subtitles.original: あなたが推してくれる愛情の桁
subtitles.english: The sheer scale of the love you give me

subtitles.original: 私は捧げる　栄養を　さあ！
subtitles.english: I'll give you nourishment, come on!

subtitles.original: Love Love Love　後ろ指チュムチュム
subtitles.english: Love Love Love, kiss the finger pointed at my back

subtitles.original: とってもとってもとってもとっても　愛して欲しい
subtitles.english: I want you to love me very, very, very, very much

subtitles.original: ハピハピハピ　最上級ハギュハギュ
subtitles.english: Happy happy happy, the ultimate hug-hug

subtitles.original: おはよおはよおはよ　はっきりはっきりはっきりはっきり
subtitles.english: Good morning, good morning, clearly, clearly, clearly, clearly

subtitles.original: ここらへんでしょ　ピコピコ気持ちの
subtitles.english: It's around here, isn't it? My piko-piko feelings...

subtitles.original: バロメーターが　超上がる
subtitles.english: ...barometer is rising like crazy!

subtitles.original: ぴゅあおし！ ぴゅあおし！ ぴゅあおし！
subtitles.english: Pure oshi! Pure oshi! Pure oshi!

subtitles.original: もう本当に本当に本当に　わかってね
subtitles.english: Really, really, really, please understand

subtitles.original: わかってね
subtitles.english: Please understand

subtitles.original: おーいみんな！ ここまでついてこれてる？
subtitles.english: Hey everyone! Can you keep up with us so far?

subtitles.original: この後もこの調子でいくよ！
subtitles.english: Let's keep going like this!

subtitles.original: うりゃおい！ うりゃおい！
subtitles.english: Urya oi! Urya oi!

subtitles.original: ちょっと待ってなんで他の子　褒めるの？
subtitles.english: Wait a second, why are you praising other girls?

subtitles.original: よそ見は　プツプツプッ！
subtitles.english: No looking away! Snap, snap, snap!

subtitles.original: 私が今　気になってるでしょ？
subtitles.english: I'm the one you're interested in right now, right?

subtitles.original: ありえないの　ありえない
subtitles.english: It's unbelievable, unbelievable

subtitles.original: プンプン　他の子に　チュチュチュだけ
subtitles.english: Pouting, just giving kisses to other girls...

subtitles.original: よそ見したよね？　うそマジ無理で
subtitles.english: You looked away, didn't you? No way, I seriously can't

subtitles.original: ぴゅあおし死んじゃう　私おこんじゃう
subtitles.english: My pure oshi will die, I'm gonna get mad

subtitles.original: 指切りしてよ　針千本
subtitles.english: Pinky swear with me, or swallow a thousand needles

subtitles.original: 心変わりしたら本当に
subtitles.english: If you have a change of heart, I'll really...

subtitles.original: 拗ねる　怒る　泣いちゃうからね！
subtitles.english: ...pout, get angry, and cry!

subtitles.original: ズンチャ！
subtitles.english: Zuncha!

subtitles.original: ぴゅあおし　してないね？
subtitles.english: You aren't doing a pure oshi, are you?

subtitles.original: 私だけに　尽くして
subtitles.english: Devote yourself only to me

subtitles.original: る（るー）
subtitles.english: -ing!

subtitles.original: ダメほらコメントが愛に溢れている
subtitles.english: No, look, the comments are overflowing with love

subtitles.original: 必死のHP　みるみる回復
subtitles.english: My critical HP is recovering instantly

subtitles.original: したよ満ち満ちなパワーじゃん
subtitles.english: Look, I'm full of power now!

subtitles.original: ごめごめごめ　ちょごめごめごめ
subtitles.english: Sorry, sorry, sorry, a little sorry, sorry, sorry

subtitles.original: Love Love Love　後ろ指チュムチュム
subtitles.english: Love Love Love, kiss the finger pointed at my back

subtitles.original: いっぱいっぱいっぱいっぱい　愛して欲しい
subtitles.english: I want you to love me so much, so much, so much

subtitles.original: ハピハピハピ　最上級ハギュハギュ
subtitles.english: Happy happy happy, the ultimate hug-hug

subtitles.original: うっとりうっとりうっとり
subtitles.english: Entranced, entranced, entranced
